rationale: The cited paper appears only in the General Discussion/managerial implications section, where it is used as an example of prior work on competitive effects of preannouncements (entry-deterrence signaling). The citing paper does not use Bayus et al. (2001) to build hypotheses, define key constructs, design measures, or interpret its core empirical results. Its role is a brief background contrast between competitor-focused preannouncement research and the current paper's consumer-uncertainty perspective.
